## Recipes.IBuiltInLoadParams.included property

Patterns to include. If specified, only collection names matching at least one pattern are included. Strings are matched exactly, RegExp patterns use `.test()`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly included?: ReadonlyArray<FilterPattern>;
```
